acceptance_targets: [chapter_17-dialogue-001] PASS if, across the revised confessions at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:215-228, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:247-252, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:343-351, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:411-416, no more than one speech opens with 'She taught me', each speaker uses at least one lexical field aligned to that character's style-bible register, and at least two confessions include a false start, interruption, or self-correction visible on the page. FAIL if the sequence still reads like parallel prepared statements.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, across the revised confessions at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:215-228, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:247-252, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:343-351, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:411-416, no more than one speech opens with 'She taught me', each speaker uses at least one lexical field aligned to that character's style-bible register, and at least two confessions include a false start, interruption, or self-correction visible on the page. FAIL if the sequence still reads like parallel prepared statements.
findings.problem: The confessional speeches are thematically clear, but too many arrive as similarly packaged thesis statements. The repeated 'She taught me...' openings and adjacent self-diagnoses make the siblings sound more coordinated than pressured, which softens the idiolect separation the style bible asks for at the chapter's emotional peak.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the admissions in snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:215-228, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:247-252, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:343-351, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_17.md:411-416 so no more than one confession uses the 'She taught me...' thesis opening. Let at least two speakers break, revise, or interrupt themselves in character-specific ways: Riva through task language, Lale through corrective precision, Iven through evasive wit collapsing into bluntness, Nami through sensory literalism, Daro through sermonic cadence fraying under pain.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on dialogue realism and voice separation: idiolect fidelity, leverage shifts, pressure cadence, anti-transcript behavior, natural colloquial texture (contractions/interruptions/slang when character-true), and pressure-true profanity usage per aesthetic risk policy.
revision_pass.label: dialogue/idiolect/cadence fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the collision of sanctity, lust, labor, rot, and family resentment. In edge cases, choose the more concrete, uncomfortable, and character-specific rendering over symbolic safety; if an image or action feels too polite for the pressure, it is probably wrong.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, violence, shame, grief, or economic pressure drives a scene, vague language counts as a failed beat; replace euphemism with the exact bodily, social, or material consequence the character experiences.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the norm across dialogue; uncontracted forms are reserved for ritual speech, emphasis, or deliberate character-specific formality.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and narrative movement aggressively: follow ordeal with meal, revelation with labor, schism with care, and public spectacle with close-bodied aftermath so no adjacent chapters share the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete, bodily, locally sacred, and unsanitized; lyrical only when pressure earns it, never as a decorative default.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person rotating among the five siblings; each scene stays inside one consciousness and lets the river press through perception rather than omniscient explanation.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate muscular propulsion with denser lyric accumulation; peak scenes should tighten and clarify rather than dissolve into fragmentary haze.
